title: iptables-save
html:
iptables-save

File Write

Context: sudo

iptables -A INPUT -i lo -j ACCEPT -m comment --comment DATA
iptables -S
iptables-save -f /path/to/output-file
excerpt: iptables-save File Write Context: sudo iptables -A INPUT -i lo -j ACCEPT -m comment --comment DATA iptables -S iptables-save -f /path/to/output-file
